overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting an elevated train ride through Night City. The player boards a train car and travels through a dense cyberpunk metropolis filled with neon signs, holographic advertisements, and towering skyscrapers at night, eventually arriving at a station platform.

events.description: moves from exterior building gap into the train car

agents.ego_description: approaching and boarding the elevated train car

entered.detail: tall gray concrete building with multiple windows
tall building with vertical red accent lighting
illuminated advertisement sign with red and white text
metal rail track for the train

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a narrow view between two massive concrete skyscrapers at night. The camera approaches an elevated train track with a neon billboard visible on the right, then transitions into the train car.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk metro train interior with passengers

events.description: train begins moving, subtle acceleration felt

agents.ego_description: seated inside the train car observing other passengers and interior details

notable_agents.action: passenger wearing blue and green shirt playing a stringed instrument
passenger standing by the train doors looking out the window

entered.detail: brown leather bench seating along the train walls
orange fluorescent light fixture on the ceiling
large window showing the city outside
digital display showing scrolling text and graphics

segments.scene_description: Inside the train car with orange neon lighting, the player observes other passengers including a musician and a standing commuter. The train begins to move, and the interior features leather seats and digital advertisement screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train passing through commercial district

events.description: view shifts from interior to exterior cityscape through train window
train moving at steady speed through dense urban environment

agents.ego_description: looking out the train window at the passing neon-lit cityscape

large holographic sign with Japanese characters
blue and orange parking garage with multiple levels
concrete overpass structure for vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the exterior view through the train window, revealing a cyberpunk commercial district with neon signs including Watson Foods and Japanese holographic advertisements. The train passes by a multi-level parking structure and elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown with holographic advertisements and steam vents

events.description: passing a large digital cherry blossom tree with pink glowing petals
train passes through area with industrial steam vents releasing white smoke

agents.ego_description: continuing to view the dense urban landscape and iconic landmarks from the moving train

entered.detail: blue neon sign for No-Tell Motel on building rooftop
steam rising from rooftop ventilation systems
holographic tree with glowing pink petals
large cyan holographic head with Cyberhub text

segments.scene_description: The train travels through the dense downtown core, passing the iconic No-Tell Motel sign and industrial steam vents. A striking digital cherry blossom tree with glowing pink petals appears briefly, followed by the Cyberhub holographic advertisement as the train continues through the neon-soaked cityscape.

events.description: train slowing down and coming to a stop at the station platform
arriving at covered station platform with waiting passengers visible

agents.ego_description: waiting as the train arrives at the station platform and comes to a complete stop

notable_agents.action: person standing on platform near the El Gaucho sign
person in white tank top standing near platform edge

entered.detail: concrete platform with passengers waiting
purple fluorescent lighting along station walls
illuminated sign for El Gaucho on station wall
dark entranceway at the end of the platform

segments.scene_description: The train slows down and arrives at a covered station platform illuminated by purple neon lights. Passengers are visible waiting on the platform near the El Gaucho sign as the train comes to a complete stop, ending the journey through Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the narrow concrete canyons of a metropolis into the neon-soaked heart of a cyberpunk city, ending at a bustling transit hub. It begins by gliding between two massive skyscrapers toward an elevated track before transitioning seamlessly into a train car bathed in orange neon light. As the train accelerates, the view shifts through the window to reveal a dense commercial district filled with Japanese holographic advertisements and multi-level parking structures. The scene then pushes deeper into the downtown core, passing industrial steam vents and a glowing digital cherry blossom tree before the cityscape blurs into a streak of neon signs and Cyberhub holograms. Finally, the train slows as it enters a covered station platform illuminated by purple lights, coming to a complete stop beside waiting passengers and the El Gaucho sign.
